test_cases.question: What is the churn risk score for customer C007?
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT churn_risk_score FROM arro_poc_predictive_attrs_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053336 WHERE customer_id = 'C007'

test_cases.question: How many customers are in the database?
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM arro_poc_performance_metrics_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053288

test_cases.question: Show me the NPS score and engagement trend for customer C001.
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT nps_score, engagement_trend FROM arro_poc_engagement_history_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053312 WHERE customer_id = 'C001'

test_cases.question: Which customers have a churn risk score greater than 0.7?
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT customer_id, churn_risk_score FROM arro_poc_predictive_attrs_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053336 WHERE churn_risk_score > 0.7 ORDER BY churn_risk_score DESC

test_cases.question: Show the top 3 customers with the highest lifetime value.
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT customer_id, lifetime_value_estimate FROM arro_poc_predictive_attrs_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053336 ORDER BY lifetime_value_estimate DESC LIMIT 3

test_cases.question: Find customers who have credit utilization above 0.75 and payment on time rate below 0.75.
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT customer_id, credit_utilization, payment_on_time_rate FROM arro_poc_performance_metrics_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053288 WHERE credit_utilization > 0.75 AND payment_on_time_rate < 0.75 ORDER BY credit_utilization DESC

test_cases.question: How many customers are in the critical risk tier?
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS critical_count FROM arro_poc_predictive_attrs_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053336 WHERE risk_tier = 'critical'

test_cases.question: What is the average monthly spend across all customers?
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT AVG(monthly_spend) AS avg_monthly_spend FROM arro_poc_performance_metrics_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053288

test_cases.question: What is the average monthly spend by customer segment?
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT pa.segment_code, AVG(pm.monthly_spend) AS avg_spend FROM arro_poc_performance_metrics_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053288 pm JOIN arro_poc_predictive_attrs_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053336 pa ON pm.customer_id = pa.customer_id GROUP BY pa.segment_code ORDER BY avg_spend DESC

test_cases.question: Show customers who are in the premium segment and have logged in more than 20 times in the last 30 days.
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT pa.customer_id, pa.segment_code, ih.total_logins_30d FROM arro_poc_predictive_attrs_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053336 pa JOIN arro_poc_interaction_history_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053259 ih ON pa.customer_id = ih.customer_id WHERE pa.segment_code = 'premium' AND ih.total_logins_30d > 20 ORDER BY ih.total_logins_30d DESC

test_cases.question: Show retained customers who completed more than 5 lessons and have an NPS score of 8 or higher.
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT pm.customer_id, ih.lessons_completed, eh.nps_score FROM arro_poc_performance_metrics_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053288 pm JOIN arro_poc_interaction_history_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053259 ih ON pm.customer_id = ih.customer_id JOIN arro_poc_engagement_history_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053312 eh ON pm.customer_id = eh.customer_id WHERE pm.target = 1 AND ih.lessons_completed > 5 AND eh.nps_score >= 8 ORDER BY ih.lessons_completed DESC

test_cases.question: Calculate the nudge response rate (nudges acted on divided by nudges received) for each customer, sorted highest first.
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT customer_id, nudges_acted_on, nudges_received, CAST(nudges_acted_on AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(nudges_received, 0) AS response_rate FROM arro_poc_interaction_history_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053259 ORDER BY response_rate DESC

test_cases.question: What is the total monthly spend for customers who have logged in more than 15 times in the last 30 days?
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(pm.monthly_spend) AS total_spend, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM arro_poc_performance_metrics_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053288 pm JOIN arro_poc_interaction_history_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053259 ih ON pm.customer_id = ih.customer_id WHERE ih.total_logins_30d > 15

test_cases.question: Find customers with email open rates above 50% who participated in at least 4 campaigns and have average balances over $5000.
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT pm.customer_id, eh.email_open_rate, eh.campaign_participation_count, pm.avg_balance FROM arro_poc_performance_metrics_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053288 pm JOIN arro_poc_engagement_history_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053312 eh ON pm.customer_id = eh.customer_id WHERE eh.email_open_rate > 0.50 AND eh.campaign_participation_count >= 4 AND pm.avg_balance > 5000 ORDER BY pm.avg_balance DESC

test_cases.question: Which customers have a monthly spend higher than the average monthly spend of all customers?
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT customer_id, monthly_spend FROM arro_poc_performance_metrics_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053288 WHERE monthly_spend > (SELECT AVG(monthly_spend) FROM arro_poc_performance_metrics_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053288) ORDER BY monthly_spend DESC

test_cases.question: Categorize customers into engagement levels: High (score above 0.7), Medium (0.4 to 0.7), and Low (below 0.4).
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT customer_id, engagement_score, CASE WHEN engagement_score > 0.7 THEN 'High' WHEN engagement_score >= 0.4 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'Low' END AS engagement_level FROM arro_poc_predictive_attrs_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053336 ORDER BY engagement_score DESC

test_cases.question: For each customer segment, show the average churn risk score, but only for segments where average monthly spend exceeds $1000.
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT pa.segment_code, AVG(pa.churn_risk_score) AS avg_churn_risk, AVG(pm.monthly_spend) AS avg_spend FROM arro_poc_predictive_attrs_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053336 pa JOIN arro_poc_performance_metrics_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053288 pm ON pa.customer_id = pm.customer_id GROUP BY pa.segment_code HAVING AVG(pm.monthly_spend) > 1000 ORDER BY avg_churn_risk ASC

test_cases.question: For each customer, show their churn risk, monthly spend, total logins, and NPS score. Only include customers with churn risk above 0.5.
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT pa.customer_id, pa.churn_risk_score, pm.monthly_spend, ih.total_logins_30d, eh.nps_score FROM arro_poc_predictive_attrs_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053336 pa JOIN arro_poc_performance_metrics_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053288 pm ON pa.customer_id = pm.customer_id JOIN arro_poc_interaction_history_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053259 ih ON pa.customer_id = ih.customer_id JOIN arro_poc_engagement_history_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053312 eh ON pa.customer_id = eh.customer_id WHERE pa.churn_risk_score > 0.5 ORDER BY pa.churn_risk_score DESC

test_cases.question: Rank customers by lifetime value within each risk tier.
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT customer_id, risk_tier, lifetime_value_estimate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY risk_tier ORDER BY lifetime_value_estimate DESC) AS rank_in_tier FROM arro_poc_predictive_attrs_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053336 ORDER BY risk_tier, rank_in_tier

test_cases.question: Identify customers who are churned (target=0) but have above-average engagement scores, suggesting a model discrepancy.
test_cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT pm.customer_id, pm.target, pa.engagement_score, pa.churn_risk_score FROM arro_poc_performance_metrics_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053288 pm JOIN arro_poc_predictive_attrs_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053336 pa ON pm.customer_id = pa.customer_id WHERE pm.target = 0 AND pa.engagement_score > (SELECT AVG(engagement_score) FROM arro_poc_predictive_attrs_iceberg_20260412210737_1776053336) ORDER BY pa.engagement_score DESC
